calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

David P. Wasserman, Esq., for the Plaintiff Golden Properties, LLC.
James Nero sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Heidi Heidelberg, an individual.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dimissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1541 Jennings Street, Apartment B, City and County of San Francisco, CA 94124.
Plaintiff waives any rent due and any holdover damages.
Other: Plaintiff reserves the right to later seek attorney's fees, and costs.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Golden Properties, LLC is present. Represented by Jim Nero.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Heidi Heidelberg IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of FEB-19-2013 remains on calendar.
